feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Assign IM mouvement to WM - Check table T156SY: entry XXX does not exist
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
For context:
I'm working on an ECC6 environment.
I'm trying to create a WM movement and then link it to a MM movement.
This movement will be called with the BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE.
So I've created the movement in SPRO. I then linked the movement through the SM30 on view V_156SC_VC as I needed to add a line and couldn't find any other solution.

My problem:
When calling the BAPI, the following error comes up “Check table T156SY: entry 311 X X Q B _ P does not exist” and indeed the table row doesn't exist and I can't find a way to fill it. Either via SPRO or SM30.

Do you know how to do this?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Understanding SM59 on ECC
entry.content: I have a customer that wants to update a solution they use for printing labels on a production line. They have a custom ABAP module that calls an RFC that is configured using SM59, which calls a remote process running on a Linux box that interfaces with the label printers. My thought is to replace this proprietary Linux application with a service written in Node.js or Java. Ideally we could do this with little or no change to the ABAP code, but just write a service that implements the same interface. I'm just starting the process of reverse engineering this so I can scope the project. But I'm not an ABAP/Basis expert so ... looking for advice at what I should be looking at.

entry.title: Cloud alternative of DESCRIBE FIELD dobj [TYPE typ [COMPONENTS com]] ??
entry.content:
I get error stating DESCRIBE is not allowed in current language version. 
My code is below:

    DESCRIBE FIELD <ls_dyn> TYPE DATA(lv_type) COMPONENTS DATA(lv_comp).

I know we have alternative for DESCRIBE TABLE.
But what should be done for DESCRIBE FIELD? 
DESCRIBE FIELD abapdocu 

Thanks!

entry.title: ABAP_trial 2022 HDB start problems: log full still active in log partition
entry.content:
Hi all,

HDB of my #abap_trial 2022 hangs on startup, in /hana/shared/HDB/HDB02/vhcala4hci/trace/daemon__0000783__children.trc I found these messages

[935]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-06-12 09:57:58.194184 i EventHandler EventManagerImpl.cpp(00962) : Could not set event 'LogFullEvent[volumeid=1,eventid=1,part=/hana/log/HDB/mnt00001/hdb00001/]' to state 'handled'
[962]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-06-12 09:57:58.194220 i Logger LogSegment.cpp(03175) : log partition disk usage 100% >= log_disk_usage_limit 95%, do not create new log segment
[962]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-06-12 09:57:58.194229 i Logger LogSegment.cpp(03294) : Retry of log segment creation failed, log full still active in log partition /hana/log/HDB/mnt00001/hdb00001/, awaiting free segment or additional disk space

df says

Filesystem 1K-blocks Used Available Use% Mounted on
overlay 263112772 261397492 0 100% /
tmpfs 65536 0 65536 0% /dev
tmpfs 10240832 0 10240832 0% /sys/fs/cgroup
shm 65536 0 65536 0% /dev/shm
/dev/sdd 263112772 261397492 0 100% /etc/hosts
tmpfs 10240832 0 10240832 0% /proc/acpi
tmpfs 10240832 0 10240832 0% /sys/firmware

Some ideas on how to overcome this? @julieplummer20 any hint?

Thanks,

  Wolfgang

entry.title: Enhancement [1] , Enhancement-Point , Enhancement-Section
entry.content:
Hi Master

I encountered the enhancement-point structure for the first time. When I did some research;

Enhancement-point : 1. It will not give default implementation 2. Along with standard code your implementation also executed 3. You can only add additional codes, you cannot change the existing code

Enhancement-section: It will give default implementation 2. Only your implementation will execute 3. You can change or replace the existing SAP code.

I learned that it is.




Enhancement 1...
Enhancement 2...
...
Does the syntax work like Enhancement-point? Or does it work like Enhancement-section?


Thanks.

entry.title: Issue in event addition via FM 'TSEG_WRITE_UPD' in delivery
entry.content:
Date from inbound idoc is not getting updated as required, only event is added in dates tab.

I have custom function module ‘Z_IDOC_INPUT_DELVRY_DTC’ which is updating date in Text tab of delivery in AS-IS scenario. We have developed logic in same FM to update same date in Dates tab, but facing issue with FM ‘TSEGE_WRITE_UPD’. Right after mentioned FM I am using Commit work to update all the details in the database. Same details are getting updated database and even in the delivery too. But after that standard V2 update FM is getting triggered and only dispatch date is deleted from database table. Other details are present in TSEGE table. 

Please find the attached screenshots.

Thank you very much in advance

entry.title: Convert Json format date to SAP readable format
entry.content:
Hi,
I am executing methods/URI's in Odata(SEGW) and I am getting dates in Json format Unix/Epoch Format : “\/Date(1567981296000)\/”.
How do i convert this to an SAP readable format like MM/DD/YYYY?
I googled this but could not find a proper straight fwd answer. I am getting '0 'as the answers for some of the googled ABAP codes.

Pls suggest.

entry.title: concatenate hrpad23 fields to validate with dbtablog abap 7.4
entry.content:
I am new to working with SAP Hana and I have not been able to solve the following problem:

I need to obtain the data from the hrpad23 table but only those that are in the dbtablog table. The problem is that to connect both tables I need to CONCATENATE the fields HRPAD23~MANDT and HRPAD23~ADATANR to compare it with the DBTABLOG~LOGKEY field, the limitations of the version abap with opensql does not allow me to CONCATENATE  in the sql statement (select)
I need help to be able to carry out this process in some way.

attentive to your comments.

Thank you

Juan Leiva

entry.title: Statement is not accessible.
entry.content:
Hi Masters,


I'm just a beginner at "Enhancement".
I want to create "enhancement" by clicking "Create Implementation" in the "ENHANCEMENT-POINT" line.

I cannot activate the "ZQM_ENH_MQEVAI10_RQEVA_CHANGE" enhancement I just created. "Statement is not accessible." I get an error.

Can you help me ?

 



Thanks.

entry.title: BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE - Error during search for WM movement type (000 Q )
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm working on an ECC6 environment.
I'm trying to create a WM movement and then link it to a MM movement.
This movement will be called with the BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE.
So I've created the movement in SPRO. I then linked it to my movement via spro LE ->WM ->Interfaces -> Define movement types -> Assign WM Movement Type References to IM Movement Types :  

and then Define movement types -> LE-WM Interface to Inventory Management

But when I run the BAPI I get the message "Error during search for WM movement type (000 Q )"

The error is triggered at this point in the BAPI because it cannot find a line because the P_RBLVS field is empty. 

My table is filled if the field is not empty.

I don't understand why the field is empty.
Can you help me?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Add custom fields in Freight Order Item Tab
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

The Requirement is to enhance the ITEM tab with another Column that would hold value for a custom field.

The Component Configurator is: /SCMTMS/WDCC_FORROAD_ITM

I have enhanced the /SCMTMS/D_TORRITE with the appended structure that would contain the custom field.

But the Field is not reflecting on the screen for which I believe the UI TREE needs to enhanced. The Add Column popup doesn’t reflect the custom field that I need to enhance the TREE.

Also once the field is added to the screen how do we make sure that the Data also gets reflected on screen?

Please could you help.

Thanks you in advance.

entry.title: The item table update always ends with runtime error in RAP action
entry.content:
Hi, RAP Experts,

The item table update always ends with runtime error in RAP action. But the similiar update for header table works. The following is the screenshots. Would you please help me on this ?

entry.title: Denied Party Block Function 66
entry.content:
Hi All,

Kindly i have a requirement where I need that the Vendor should not be accessed in FB60 Table while creating invoice ie. vendor need to be blocked on FI Level. The user should get the message "Vendor blocked". The vendor is already blocked on MM level and cannot create Purchase order.

Please convey suitable User exit or BADI where we may write the code for the same.

entry.title: TIME_OUT in t-code VA02 while deleting document
entry.content:
Hiya all.

We're getting TIME_OUT short dumps when deleting some SD docs via VA02. I traced the ST22, put a break-point in the exploding line, and found something weird.

The dump is raised within a LOOP in the DELETE_TEXT function module. While debugging, I found the system calls that function continually, with the it CATALOG containing one additional line each time the module is called.

I'm about to keep debugging that thing, but before that, I decided to try to get some hints from here. Maybe any of you has experienced that behaviour and can lend a hand before my brain melts.

I cannot promise I'll give you points for the right answer, but will do my best to be thankful and a good person enough to post my advances if I'll get any.

Thanks in advance,

Vic

Update: for some reason, the form that should read the std texts of the header retrieves the whole stxh table... or it seems so

 

*---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*       FORM KOPFTEXTE_SELEKTIEREN                                    *
*---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*       Vorhandene Kopftexte selektieren                              *
*---------------------------------------------------------------------*
FORM KOPFTEXTE_SELEKTIEREN.

  CALL FUNCTION 'SELECT_TEXT'
       EXPORTING
            OBJECT     = 'VBBK      '
            NAME       = XTHEAD-TDNAME
            ID         = '*   '
            LANGUAGE   = '*'
       IMPORTING
            ENTRIES    = TXT_ENTRIES
       TABLES
            SELECTIONS = REFTEXT.

ENDFORM.

 

The value of XTHEAD-TDNAME is empty, so the FM retrieves the whole table with OBJECT 'VBBK'...

I guess it's because something we do wrong, but the only thing we do different in the SDocs is to SHOW one of the BP's texts in one of the header's additional data folder. Nothing editable text-related there...

entry.title: Schedule a background job to execute a Transactions
entry.content:
Hello everyone  , 

i want , if i can,  to programming a background job to execute a Transactions on the month end.

For example , 

i want to run every end month of month transaction :  AFABN (with Variants) 

Can you help me to make this Job ?

You suggest me to make this from SM36 Transaction ?

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: conditional breaks Adobe Form
entry.content:
I am trying to make a conditional break based on one of the fields of the table. However, it did not work.
here are screenshots for all steps I did:

I want the conditional break to happen with the change of CYCLE value.
I want the form to be like this:

but instead this happened:

ABAP Development SAP Forms service by Adobe

entry.title: Automatic replication of custom table data upon update
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requirement in which there is a custom table with customer/vendor as key fields and other custom fields in which this will be updated from and RFC call from external system and once data is updated in the table the specific customer/vendor data has to be replicated to target systems. 

Can you guys please help me how this can be achieved.

entry.title: V_KNA1_SINGLE_READ not found kunnr but exist in KNA1
entry.content:
Hello, 

i use the bapi : BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE 

all is ok, for one custommer it's not ok.

The function module V_KNA1_SINGLE_READ do not found the custommer.

If i use V_KNA1_SINGLE_READ with SE37, it's ok.

Do you have an idea ?

Thank's

Thierry

entry.title: How to flow make custom fields from Sales order to PR and PO?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts!!

I have created custom fields in Sales order item level in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition. How to make those custom fields flow to Purchase Requisition item and Purchase order item level.

I checked in Business Scenerios option in Custom fields tab while creating custom fields, but there PR and PR is not there.

It would be grateful if you could help me out.

Thanks in Advance,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: AIF Table /AIF/EPP_CORRE is growing fast
entry.content:
Hello,

we see table /AIF/EPP_CORRE has ~300 Million records and our system is 1 and half old since implemented. We use AIF extensively for most of interfaces. 
Not finding much help on purpose of this /AIF/EPP_CORRE table and way to clean up. We don't have ILM setup
Please assist on how to clean up this table?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
